title: macrotyloma stipulosum
intro: Macrotyloma stipulosum, also known as Horse Gram, is a perennial legume plant native to the tropical regions of Africa and Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Macrotyloma stipulosum include its ability to help manage diabetes, improve cardiovascular health, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the seeds of the plant can be roasted and ground into a powder, or boiled and consumed as a decoction to harness its medicinal properties.
